estimationRequests.title: Mobile Banking App
estimationRequests.rawContent:
# Mobile Banking App PRD

## Overview
A consumer-facing mobile banking application that enables users to manage accounts, transfer funds, pay bills, and deposit checks via camera capture. The app targets iOS and Android with a shared React Native codebase...
estimationRequests.projectOverview: A consumer-facing mobile banking application enabling account management, fund transfers, bill payments, and mobile check deposits. Targets iOS and Android via React Native with a Node.js backend. Must comply with PCI DSS and SOC 2 requirements. Initial release scoped to US market with English language support.
technicalConstraints: React Native for cross-platform mobile (iOS + Android)
PCI DSS compliance required for payment processing
Must integrate with Plaid for bank account linking
ambiguities: No mention of offline mode — should the app function without connectivity?
Bill pay frequency unclear — one-time only or recurring scheduled payments?
Check deposit limits not specified — what are the daily and monthly caps?
Push notification strategy not detailed — what events trigger notifications?
No accessibility requirements stated — WCAG 2.1 AA compliance expected?
implicitRequirements: Session timeout and automatic logout for security compliance
Transaction history with search and filtering
Account balance caching for fast load times
Error handling for failed transfers with retry mechanism
Rate limiting on sensitive endpoints (login, transfers)

features.name: Account Dashboard
features.description: Overview screen showing all linked accounts with real-time balances, recent transactions, and quick-action shortcuts for common operations.

features.name: Fund Transfers
features.description: Transfer money between own accounts or to external accounts via ACH. Includes transfer scheduling, amount validation, and confirmation flow with receipt.

features.name: Bill Payment
features.description: Search and add billers, enter payment amounts, select payment dates. Support for one-time payments with payee management.

features.name: Mobile Check Deposit
features.description: Capture front and back of check using device camera. Image quality validation, amount entry, and deposit confirmation with hold period display.

features.name: Authentication & Security
features.description: Login with email/password plus biometric unlock. Multi-factor authentication for sensitive operations. Session management and device trust.

features.name: Plaid Account Linking
features.description: Integrate Plaid Link SDK for connecting external bank accounts. Handle OAuth flows, account verification, and connection status management.

features.name: Transaction History
features.description: Paginated list of all transactions across accounts with search, date range filtering, category tags, and export to CSV.

features.name: Push Notifications
features.description: Real-time alerts for incoming deposits, completed transfers, low balance warnings, and security events. User-configurable notification preferences.
